name: Sigmoidoscopy Procedure Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for flexible sigmoidoscopy procedures. Used in the colorectal cancer screening measure (COL) as a screening modality with 5-year lookback window.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Sigmoidoscopy, flexible; with biopsy, single or multiple
Sigmoidoscopy, flexible; with removal of foreign body
Sigmoidoscopy, flexible; with removal of tumor(s), polyp(s) by hot biopsy forceps
Sigmoidoscopy, flexible; with control of bleeding
Sigmoidoscopy, flexible; with directed submucosal injection(s)
Sigmoidoscopy, flexible; with decompression of volvulus
Sigmoidoscopy, flexible; with removal of tumor(s), polyp(s) by snare technique
Sigmoidoscopy, flexible; with transendoscopic balloon dilation
Sigmoidoscopy, flexible; with endoscopic ultrasound examination
Sigmoidoscopy, flexible; with transendoscopic ultrasound guided intramural or transmural fine needle aspiration/biopsy
